name: open_io_design
full_help:
open_io_design

Description: 
Open an IO design

Syntax: 
open_io_design  [-name <arg>] [-part <arg>] [-constrset <arg>] [-quiet]
                [-verbose]

Returns: 
design object

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-name]       Design name
  [-part]       Target part
  [-constrset]  Constraint fileset to use
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
